Overwrite these files into your existing portfolio_toolchain_ui_mock_v2 project root.
Round 3 updates:
- XCP UI: shortened signal list with simple mock names (signal1~signal8).
- Time-Series UI: replaced with a lighter original-style desktop-tool mock based on your screenshot.
- BEV UI: objects now move along the curve, predicted RoadRadius corridor shown, and overlap cases are labeled "오감지".
